mapper.select: select round( (net_gen_val*rec_weight) , 2) as rec_deal, net_gen_val as smp_deal, gen_revn_idx, site_id, gen_type, std_timestamp, std_date, meter_read_day, smp_rate, rec_rate, rec_weight, produce_val, consume_val, net_gen_val, smp_price, rec_price, tot_price, reg_date, mod_date from tb_gen_revenue where 1=1 and gen_type = '1' and site_id = #{siteId } and std_date between str_to_date(#{selTermFrom },'%Y%m%d%H%i%s') and str_to_date(#{selTermTo },'%Y%m%d%H%i%s') order by std_date

select site_id, std_timestamp, sum(net_gen_val) as net_gen_val, sum(smp_deal) as smp_deal, sum(smp_price) as smp_price, sum(rec_deal) as rec_deal, sum(rec_price) as rec_price, sum(tot_price) as tot_price from ( select usg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, usg_val as net_gen_val, usg_val+3400000 as smp_deal, usg_val+(3400000*2) as smp_price, usg_val+(3400000*3) as rec_deal , usg_val+(3400000*4) as rec_price, usg_val+(3400000*5) as tot_price from tb_usage where 1=1 and site_id = 'c64b328b'
and std_date between str_to_date('20180820000000','%Y%m%d%H%i%s') and str_to_date('20180820025959','%Y%m%d%H%i%s') ) a where 1=1 group by site_id, std_timestamp
